title: Patient Forms
subtitle: Download, complete, and bring patient forms to your appointment, or fill them out online before your visit.
beforeAppointmentText:
To expedite your check-in and ensure we have complete information about your medical history, please complete the appropriate patient forms before your appointment.

Complete your paperwork online using the secure links below. All online forms are hosted on a HIPAA-compliant server — your information is safe. If you do not have your paperwork complete prior to your appointment, please plan to arrive 15 minutes early.

newPatientForms.title: New Patient Paperwork (Pulmonary & Sleep Packet)
newPatientForms.description: Comprehensive patient demographics, medical history, and intake forms. Required for all new patients.

establishedPatientForms.title: General Consent for Care and Treatment
establishedPatientForms.description: Initial consent for medical evaluation and treatment.

establishedPatientForms.title: Consent to Leave or Send Medical Information
establishedPatientForms.description: Authorization for sharing medical records with other providers.

establishedPatientForms.title: Acknowledgement of Privacy Practices & Patient Responsibility
establishedPatientForms.description: HIPAA privacy notice acknowledgement and patient financial responsibility.

downloadableForms.title: Release of Information
downloadableForms.description: Authorization for release of medical records to other providers or parties.

downloadableForms.title: Sleep Diary
downloadableForms.description: Track your sleep patterns before your sleep medicine appointment.

downloadableForms.title: Notice of Privacy Practices
downloadableForms.description: HIPAA privacy notice detailing how your medical information is used and protected.

onlineServices.title: Patient Portal / Epic MyChart
onlineServices.description: Access your medical records, test results, view medications, and communicate with your care team.

onlineServices.title: Online Scheduling
onlineServices.description: Schedule or reschedule your appointments at your convenience, 24/7.

onlineServices.title: Online Bill Payment
onlineServices.description: Pay your medical bills securely online using our payment portal.

ctaText: Complete your forms and book your appointment with one of our specialists.
